title: PolicyRuleSet
description: Protocol-owned declarative policy rule-set family. Policy documents are schema-validated and contain no embedded scripting.

policyRule.description: One declarative rule matched by action-kind and optional capability.

rule_id.description: Deterministic rule identifier within this rule set.

effect.description: Rule effect; runtime precedence remains deny > require_human_approval > allow.

action_kind.description: Action kind this rule applies to.

capability_id.description: Optional capability constraint for this rule.

reason_code.description: Stable policy_reason_code emitted when this rule is selected.

details_schema_id.description: Details schema identifier for structured decision details.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for declarative policy rule sets.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this rule set.

rules.description: Declarative policy rules with deterministic precedence applied at evaluation time.
